prompt: Edit the 3D render in image 1: Convert the mole character to the friendly cartoon style of image 3, and render it within the vibrant autumn environment and warm lighting depicted in image 2.

This new setting should reflect the richly colored fallen leaves and warm, soft natural lighting characteristics seen in image 2.
objects: Mole character (in friendly, simplified cartoon style)
